note: Regenerated Sprint 50 — the April 2026 file claimed zero scripts built; reality: full harness shipped and hardened through Sprint 50.

gaps.description: Literal concept matching remains; semantic-net threshold (D6) and richer win extraction quality need iteration on real usage.
cron_pause suppresses the printed reminder but the CronCreate job still fires each interval and consumes a turn while the session idles. Scheduler-level pause is not exposed to hooks.

gaps.topic: Headless claude -p auth on this machine
gaps.description: GLM/z.ai ANTHROPIC_API_KEY hijacks headless auth ('Credit balance is too low'). Workaround: env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN -u ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL claude -p ...
Independent verifiers are used every sprint, but no systematic planted-failure calibration harness exists yet.
